query: We are a small enterprise manufacturing 33 Grade Ordinary Portland Cement. Which BIS standard covers the chemical and physical requirements for our product?
I need to comply with the regulations for coarse and fine aggregates derived from natural sources intended for use in structural concrete.
What is the official specification for manufacturing precast concrete pipes, both with and without reinforcement, for water mains?
Our company is shifting to manufacturing hollow and solid lightweight concrete masonry blocks. What standard outlines the dimensions and physical requirements?
Looking for the standard detailing corrugated and semi-corrugated asbestos cement sheets used for roofing and cladding.
What is the Indian Standard covering the manufacture, chemical, and physical requirements for Portland slag cement?
We are setting up a plant to produce Portland pozzolana cement that is calcined clay based. What is the applicable standard?
Which standard applies to masonry cement used for general purposes where mortars for masonry are required, but not intended for structural concrete?
Looking for the standard that details the composition, manufacture, and testing of supersulphated cement, particularly for marine works or aggressive water conditions.
Our company manufactures White Portland cement for architectural and decorative purposes. Which standard governs its physical and chemical requirements?

We manufacture building limes for construction use, ranging from eminently hydraulic lime for structural purposes to fat lime for plastering and whitewashing. Which BIS standard covers the classification, chemical and physical requirements for all classes of building lime?

Our factory produces common burnt clay building bricks with compressive strength below 40 N/mm². What BIS standard governs the classification, dimensions, tolerances and physical requirements for these bricks?
We supply marble blocks, slabs and tiles for construction projects and need to meet BIS requirements for sizes, physical properties, quality and workmanship of marble.
What is the Indian Standard specifying the dimensions and workmanship of natural building stones, such as ashlar, block-in-course and rubble types, used in masonry work?

We are a manufacturer of plain gypsum plaster boards intended for use as vertical or horizontal linings in buildings. Which BIS standard covers the requirements for dimensions, types and mass of plaster for such boards?
Our unit produces structural timber for use in buildings. We require the BIS standard that covers grading, permissible defects and prohibited defects for sawn timber used in structural applications.
Which BIS standard covers physical and chemical requirements for paving bitumen used in roadways and runways, including classification into grades by penetration value?

We manufacture cement concrete flooring tiles including plain cement, plain coloured and terrazzo types for general purpose and heavy duty use. What BIS standard specifies the dimensions, wearing layer thickness and finish requirements for these tiles?
Our company produces bitumen felts for waterproofing and damp-proofing of roofs, including saturated underlay felts and self-finished felts on fibre and hessian base. Which BIS standard applies?

We manufacture high strength deformed steel bars and wires in grades Fe 415, Fe 500 and Fe 550 for use as reinforcement in concrete structures. Which BIS standard specifies the chemical composition, nominal sizes and mechanical properties for these bars?

Our plant produces steel plates, strips, sections, flats and bars for general structural purposes, suitable for welded, bolted and riveted structures. Which BIS standard governs the grades, chemical composition and mechanical properties of this structural steel?

We supply safety glass for glazing windows and doors of buildings, including toughened and laminated types. What is the relevant BIS standard covering requirements and test methods for general purpose safety glass?
What BIS standard covers the requirements for clay roofing tiles of the Mangalore pattern, specifying dimensions, quality and physical requirements for these traditional roofing products?

We are looking to comply with the Indian Standard for fly ash-lime bricks used in building construction, covering classification by wet compressive strength, dimensions and general quality requirements.

Which BIS standard specifies requirements for dust-pressed ceramic tiles with low water absorption of 3 percent or less, covering dimensions, surface quality and mechanical properties for Group BI tiles?

Our company manufactures hollow steel sections — square and rectangular — for structural use. Which BIS standard covers the designation, dimensions, weights and properties of these cold-formed and hot-formed hollow sections?
We produce flat transparent sheet glass for building applications and need to know which BIS standard governs its quality grades, permitted defects and dimensional requirements.

What is the BIS standard that covers requirements for Portland pozzolana cement manufactured using fly ash as the pozzolanic material, including chemical composition and physical strength requirements?

We are a manufacturer of mild steel and medium tensile steel bars used as concrete reinforcement. Which BIS standard specifies their chemical composition, mechanical properties and dimensional tolerances?

Our firm produces burnt clay hollow bricks intended for use in walls and partitions. Which BIS standard lays down the requirements for classification, dimensions and physical properties of these hollow bricks?
